headline: The Power Plant Signal Hiding Inside Caterpillar Stock
summary: The real story behind the earthmoving giant’s doubled stock price emerged from a record-setting order book for a very different kind of machine.

headline: Deere & Company (DE) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know

headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Deere, Raises Price Target to $610
summary: Citigroup  analyst Kyle Menges   maintains Deere (NYSE:DE) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $575 to $610.

headline: 2 Profitable Stocks to Research Further and 1 We Question
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.
